Watch the new GTA 6 trailer for the upcoming Grand Theft Auto 6 game from Rockstar Games.

Meet the GTA 6 characters, spot a few GTA 6 map locations, and more in this exciting look at the GTA 6 trailer 2."},{"url":"https://www.tomsguide.com/news/live/grand-theft-auto-6-trailer-live","title":"GTA 6 trailer live reactions — there's so much to unpack | Tom's Guide","content":"The trailer digs into all the details about the main characters, their complicated relationship, and so much more.
There's a lot more to see and learn about the game from what Rockstar has released on the GTA 6 website.
What we need now are some concentrated gameplay videos, which likely won't release until next year a couple months before the May release.
If you're looking forward to the game and want to know more about the main characters, Jason Duval and Lucia Caminos, this is the trailer you've been waiting for.
In case you missed the massive news story, Rockstar announced that Grand Theft Auto 6 would launch on May 26, 2026, which is more than a year away.
One of it's most exciting details is a broader understanding of the story.
Jason and Lucia will be our main players for Grand Theft Auto 6.
Through friends, like Cal Hampton, Boobie Ike, De'Quan Priest, Real Dimez, Raul Bautista, and Brian Heder, the world of Vice City will truly come to life — and haunt the pair once the sun sets...
This means that, per the recent delay to May 26, 2026, Grand Theft Auto VI is set to launch 20 years following the fictional city's initial debut.
Cal Hampton is everyone's crazy uncle.
And it's not even via the PS5 Pro!
Boobie Ike is the life of the party.
He's a Vice City local through-and-through, knowing the club scene more than most across Leonida."},{"url":"https://www.rockstargames.com/VI/","title":"Grand Theft Auto VI - Rockstar Games","content":"PlayStation 5Xbox Series X|S
Download and share official videos, screenshots, and more."},{"url":"https://www.cbsnews.com/news/gta-6-trailer-2-release-grand-theft-auto-rockstar-vice-city/","title":"Grand Theft Auto 6 drops a surprise second trailer. Here are all the details. - CBS News","content":"Grand Theft Auto 6 has dropped a surprise second trailer just days after Rockstar Games said it's pushing back the game's much-anticipated release until May 2026.
The second trailer provides more details about the game's storyline, which involves its first-ever female protagonist, Lucia.
With GTA 5 having sold more than 200 million copies, expectations are high for GTA 6, with Wedbush Securities forecasting sales of $6.35 billion in sales for fiscal year 2026.
The second trailer, which was released about 17 months after the game's first trailer, introduces more of the backstory between its main characters, Jason Duval and Lucia Caminos.
Along with the trailer, Rockstar Games also released new screenshots of the game on its website, featuring new characters and a number of locations, including Vice City — the fictional city inspired by Miami — and Leonida Keys, which bears a resemblance to the Florida Keys."},{"url":"https://mein-mmo.de/en/gta-6-release-trailer-and-map-the-most-important-information-about-the-action-game,1065339/","title":"GTA 6: Release, Trailer and Map – The most important ...","content":"Jan 23, 2025 — Trailer 2 of GTA 6 introduces new characters.
